CustomField.formula: IF( CASE( SBQQ__Quote__r.Sub_Vertical__c, "Legal", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.Is_Legal__c), "Accounting", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.Is_Accounting__c), "Consulting", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.Is_Consulting__c), "IB&A", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.Is_IBA__c), "PCM", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.Is_PCM__c), "Corporate", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.Iss_Corporate__c), "Real Assets", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.Is_Real_Assets__c), "Other", TEXT(SBQQ__Product__r.Other__c), "" ) = "Restricted", IMAGE("/img/msg_icons/warning24.png", "Restricted Product", 16, 16) & " Restricted", IMAGE("/img/msg_icons/confirm24.png", "Not Restricted", 16, 16) & " Active" )
CustomField.label: Status
